name: The Jarring Shift
vibe: Angular and unsettling. The half-step jump from A to Bb creates immediate tension.

name: The Tritone Stab
vibe: Brutal and unstable. Less about melody, more about harmonic shock.

name: The Chromatic Climb
vibe: Disorienting. A minor start that climbs chromatically to an unexpected major resolution.

name: The Nervous Loop
vibe: Creates a sense of unease. Great for building tension before a breakdown.
